if_interested.action: Write reply to new_replies.json. Classify here as INTERESTED. Prepare bespoke proposal within 24 hours — MANDATORY. Log CHANGELOG. Activate LinkedIn within Day 7 hard deadline (2026-05-19). Update CRM/pipeline stage to 'proposal_sent' after proposal sent.
if_interested.24h_sla: NON-NEGOTIABLE. Tom (Ripon Road Carpentry) asked for pricing and never got it. That does not repeat.
if_interested.linkedin_deadline: Day 7 = Tuesday 2026-05-19. Archive trigger fires immediately if missed.

if_not_interested.action: Classify as NOT_INTERESTED. Suppress email channel permanently. Block LinkedIn permanently for this lead. Log CHANGELOG. Update lead status to 'lost'.

if_ooo.action: Classify as OUT_OF_OFFICE. Note return date. Pause sequence. Resume Day-3 bump day after stated return. Do not re-send during OOO period.
if_ooo.resume_rule: If OOO return date is past Friday: send bump on day after return, using the same Day-3 template.

if_wrong_person.action: Classify as WRONG_PERSON. Pause sequence for this email address. Investigate correct contact via website/Companies House. Log CHANGELOG.

if_unsubscribe.action: Classify as UNSUBSCRIBE. Suppress permanently within 24 hours (GDPR Article 21). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG. Block all channels.
